title: Quest Steam Iron 2200W - 40s Rapid Heat‑Up, Variable Temp, Self‑Clean & Non‑Stick Soleplate, Lightweight Blue Clothes Iron
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: READY IN 40 SECONDS - Press start, iron within a minute - perfect for last‑minute shirts.

VARIABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL – Set your temperature anywhere between 60° to the maximum temperature of 240° to remove even the most stubborn of creases. Crease‑Busting Steam: 20 g/min continuous plus burst mode for stubborn lines.

NON-STICK SOLEPLATE – This iron features a non-stick soleplate that will allow for an effortless glide over your piles of ironing. The iron also features a 230ml water tank, allowing for more ironing before the need to fill up.

SELF CLEANING IRON – The self-clean function on this industrial iron removes scaling and impurities without the need for human interaction. The iron also features a 2m power cord, ensuring you don’t always need to set up directly next to a plug socket.
QUEST APPLIANCES – With a wide range of home appliances like steam irons, hoovers & student essential cooking appliances, you’re sure to find exactly what you need at the Quest Amazon store.
description: Product Description Previous page Quick Heating With its quick heating, the iron will be ready for use in just 40 seconds, saving plenty of time. Self Cleaning The iron's self-cleaning function removes scaling and impurities with no effort required. Easy Controls Iron different kinds of materials by changing the temperature of the iron using the simple dial. Non-Stick Soleplate Ensure a smooth ironing experience that protects your clothes with the non-stick soleplate. Next page 1 Quick Heating 2 Self Cleaning 3 Easy Controls 4 Non-Stick Soleplate

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎40 Second Rapid Heating, Non-Stick Soleplate, Safety Features Built In, Self-Cleaning, Variable Temperature Control
